name: Airborne Justice
short_description: Airborne Justice is a shoot 'em up that pays homage to classics from the golden age of video games. Take control of a helicopter, fight enemies, and restore peace to the skies!
detailed_description:
.

Airborne Justice offers an old-school arcade experience for one or two players. As the Thunderflash team, Rock and Stan (protagonists previously seen in Thunderflash and Biomech Hell), you'll pilot a helicopter capable of rapid fire, maneuver through the clouds, and harness the incredible power of thunder.
Five levels filled with challenges create a short but satisfying game, with the option to replay with extra modes!

Features:

  • A tribute to the 194X series and many other genre classics!
  • Play with a friend and enjoy double the fun!
  • Pixel art graphics!
  • Top-notch soundtrack!
  • Unlock incredible pixel art artwork!
  • Various power-ups and the ability to activate the "Thunderflash" bomb!
  • Secret extra modes: Speed Mode, Remix Mode, and Survival Mode!
  • Take down huge bosses by hitting their weak points!
  • Plenty of achievements!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese
